arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool make four changes as Alisson Becker, Darwin Nunez calls made
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has made four changes to his starting lineup for Saturday's clash with Bournemouth, as Alisson Becker misses out and Darwin Nunez starts.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bournemouth - 3pm Premier League: Live Score, team news and updates from all six games as Everton and Southampton look to claim first three points of season
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Premier League 3pm kick-offs including action from Liverpool vs Bournemouth, Leicester vs Everton, Southampton vs Ipswich and Aston Villa vs Wolves.

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa full Liverpool debut vs Bournemouth could be extra special for simple reason
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa is in line to make his debut for Liverpool when they take on Bournemouth at Anfield in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Arne Slot pushes for Virgil van Dijk resolution as Liverpool skipper sets out demands
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk's contract at Liverpool will expire at the end of the season, but boss Arne Slot is desperate to keep hold of his captain having been left impressed by the Dutchman's performances

arts.ttl: I made Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk fume with car park prank - he tried to defend himself
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk was on the receiving end of a prank during his time at Southampton, former teammate Shane Long has revealed

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bournemouth LIVE - team news, kick-off time, TV channel, score and commentary stream

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk warns Liverpool to avoid bad 'habit'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is determined for Liverpool not to get into the 'habit' of losing games at home. "Like I said earlier, we don't lose many games at Anfield, and that is certainly not a habit we want to be starting now.

arts.ttl: Liverpool icon Steven Gerrard impact clear as Cristiano Ronaldo sends three-word verdict
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard's Al-Ettifaq had the chance to go top of the table on Friday but suffered defeat to Cristiano Ronaldo's Al-Nassr as Sadio Mane inspired in 3-0
